feat.name: Mass Delusion
feat.text: You wave around fabricated evidence that contradicts what your enemies know to be true. When you Fabricate Truth, you can affect all enemies within 30 feet of you. Compare your Deception check result to the Will DCs of all targets. It is possible to get a different degree of success for each target.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
